# UriTemplate.Scheme method

Extracts the lower-cased scheme of a URI string, or `null` when the value is not a string with a conformant RFC 3986 scheme (everything before the first `:`). (§17.9, R-17.9-e)

```csharp
public static string? Scheme(string? value)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| value | The candidate URI string. |

## Return Value

The lower-cased scheme, or `null` when no conformant scheme is present.
